title: Conductive composition and production method therefor, and water-soluble polymer and production method therefor
abstract: A conductive composition may include a conductive polymer (A), a water-soluble polymer (B), and a solvent (C1). The water-soluble polymer (B) may include a water-soluble polymer (B11) of formula (11), and a water-soluble polymer (B2) of formula (2) as the water-soluble polymer (B) of 0.15% by mass or less, based on a total mass of the conductive composition:
claims: 1. A conductive composition, comprising: a conductive polymer (A); a water-soluble polymer (B); and a solvent (C1), wherein the water-soluble polymer (B) comprises a water-soluble polymer (B11) of formula (11), and a water-soluble polymer (B2), wherein the water-soluble polymer (B2) is present in 0.15% by mass or less, based on total conductive composition mass, wherein the water-soluble polymer (B11) has formula (11):
